LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MOACIR SANTOS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING THAT HE IS ENTITLED TO EQUITABLE RELIEF. EVEN ASSUMING ARGUENDO THAT DEFENDANT MIGHT HAVE A MERITORIOUS DEFENSE, HE HAS FAILED TO ARTICULATE A SATISFACTORY EXCUSE FOR NOT PRESENTING A DEFENSE IN THE ACTION. NOR HAS HE DEMONSTRATED DILIGENCE IN SEEKING TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT ONCE IT WAS DISCOVERED. (SEE STILES V. WALLIS (1983) 147 CAL.APP.3D 1143.) PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES HUNTER, CSR #6576

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MOACIR SANTOS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is DENIED. Defendant failed to present evidence establishing that he is entitled to equitable relief. Even assuming arguendo that defendant might have a meritorious defense, he has failed to articulate a satisfactory excuse for not presenting a defense in the action. Nor has he demonstrated diligence in seeking to set aside the default once it was discovered. (See Stiles v. Wallis (1983) 147 Cal.App.3d 1143.) Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order in accordance with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Motion For Leave To File First-Amended Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Moacir Santos; Exhibits
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MOACIR SANTOS dba SANTOS PAVING, dba SANTOS ENGINEERING'S Motion For Leave To File First-Amended Cross-Complaint is DENIED as moot in light of my ruling denying the motion to vacate default and entry of default. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order in accordance with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Martin N. Jensen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Devon Bolla Trustee of Haight St. Trust.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Moacir Santos.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

The mechanics lien recorded on the real property located at 371 Haight St. San Francisco, CA 94102 is ordered to be removed.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
